name: Spectral Warden of the Ruins
description: A translucent figure in tarnished armour drifts through the broken hall, its sword trailing wisps of blue flame. The warden's voice echoes like wind through a bell tower — it speaks of oaths unbroken and trespassers unwelcome.
failureConsequence: The warden's spectral blade passes through your guard and chills you to the marrow. You flee the ruins shivering, unable to return until the cold leaves your bones.
